children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established within the Office an Office of Weed and Seed Strategies, headed by a Director appointed by the Attorney General.

children.heading: Assistance
children.label: b Assistance
children.text: The Director may assist States, units of local government, and neighborhood and community-based organizations in developing Weed and Seed strategies, as provided in .section 10104 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $60,000,000 for fiscal year 2006, and such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2007, 2008, and 2009, to remain available until expended.
